1f:["$","br","27",{"className":"block h-4"}]
20:["$","li","28",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Control Threshold**: More than 50% participation rights"}]
21:["$","li","29",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Attribution Rules**: Income attribution to controlling residents"}]
22:["$","li","30",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Deemed Dividends**: CFC income treated as dividends"}]
23:["$","li","31",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Exemption Thresholds**: Small CFC exemptions may apply"}]
24:["$","br","32",{"className":"block h-4"}]

58:["$","li","84",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Criminal Prosecution**: Willful non-compliance consequences"}]

5a:["$","br","86",{"className":"block h-4"}]
